## Meeting Purpose

[Address unexpected article publishing issues and discuss content strategy improvements for ProjectMark.](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unpublished articles are being automatically published when linked from other published articles, causing workflow disruptions](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Content quality issues identified: missing backlinks, unsupported claims, and ineffective metadata impacting click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [New focus on conversion rate optimization (CRO) for website and content strategy to improve lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Topics

### Unexpected Article Publishing Issue

  - [Unpublished articles are automatically getting published when backlinked from published articles](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Gus noticed \~20 articles unexpectedly published in the last couple of days](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Issue seems tied to recent increase in article publishing activity](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Andrej will investigate the cause, as it's an unprecedented problem in their workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Several articles found lacking backlinks or containing unsupported claims](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Andrej to implement a feedback loop in the workflow to double-check links and credible claims](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [20 articles have received updated, more actionable meta descriptions and SEO titles](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [CTAs added to most articles, with a few older ones still pending](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

### Performance Metrics and Strategy

  - [Impressions are increasing (e.g., 18,000+ for "constructor and industry lead")](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Click-through rates remain low (e.g., 11 clicks from 18,000 impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Focus on improving metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Andrej to prepare 40 new, less technical, more top-of-funnel topics by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

  - [Current website mainly uses "Get a Demo" and "Watch Video" CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Plan to implement a more CRO-focused strategy on the website](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Separate CRO-focused call scheduled for Tuesday to discuss benchmarks and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to archive articles not ready for publication to prevent unintended publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Andrej to manually check and fix backlinks in published and draft articles](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Implement automated checks for article existence and publication status in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Andrej to update 10 more articles' metadata by Friday, prioritizing high-impression, low-click content](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Schedule CRO strategy call for Tuesday to discuss website optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Andrej to send CRO benchmark document and examples to Gus before the Tuesday call](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and addressing the unexpected publishing issue](https://fathom.video/share/ST8v83NLkMqZsq7qi-_sy3-18VG2DjGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
